---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement for ARIA
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem this feature would solve or the need it would fulfill.

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution or how this feature should work.

## Affected Module
Which ARIA module does this affect?
- [ ] DKSM (Domain Knowledge Staleness Monitor)
- [ ] LCI (Live Context Injector)
- [ ] PP (Pipeline Pulse)
- [ ] AVL (AI Value Ledger)
- [ ] FLE (Feedback Loop Engine)
- [ ] ASGC (AI Stack Governance Console)

## Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative approaches or solutions you've considered.

## Success Criteria
How would you verify this feature works correctly?
